title: ASR Outdoor Complete 11pc Gold Panning Kit with 1/2 and 1/4 Classifier Screens
description:
A great gold panning kit that really has all your bases covered when out in the field. This 11pc kit from ASR Outdoor includes a shovel for gathering material, 1/2 and 1/4 inch sifting screens for incrementally working down your deposit, three dual riffle gold pans, a small magnetic pick up tool for removing heavy materials like black sand, a snifter bottle for extracting small gold nuggets or flake gold from your gold pan, magnifying tweezers for examination of materials and lastly, glass vials that will keep found gold or other valuable materials safe and secure on your journey back from site. The items in this kit that will increase your chances of recovering valuable material are the 1/2 and 1/4 inch 304 stainless steel wire mesh classifier screens

ASR Outdoor Complete 11pc Gold Panning Kit with 1/2 and 1/4 Classifier Screens

A great gold panning kit that really has all your bases covered when out in the field. This 11pc kit from ASR Outdoor includes a shovel for gathering material, 1/2 and 1/4 inch sifting screens for incrementally working down your deposit, three dual riffle gold pans, a small magnetic pick up tool for removing heavy materials like black sand, a snifter bottle for extracting small gold nuggets or flake gold from your gold pan, magnifying tweezers for examination of materials and lastly, glass vials that will keep found gold or other valuable materials safe and secure on your journey back from site.

Key Features

  • 11PC GOLD PANNING KIT: A great kit from ASR Outdoor that will have all your bases covered when out in the field gold panning; the main components of this gold panning are three dual riffle gold pans (8, 10 and 14 inch), 1/2 and 1/4 inch classifier screens and the 5lbs magnetic pick up tool pen
  • SOIL SIFTER: Essential for working down your field deposit to a manageable size, these sifting screens help to sort unwanted material out of your deposit, are stackable, made from high impact ABS plastic and designed to sit on top of a five gallon bucket
  • GOLD PANNING EQUIPMENT: This includes some important gold prospecting equipment like the 5lbs magnetic pick up tool for separating black sand from gold, a snifter bottle for extraction, magnifying tweezers for examination and glass vials for safe and secure storage from your claim site
  • GOLD PAN: Please note that the three dual riffle gold pans should be seasoned before use by washing off all factory production oils with soap and water
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Total Pieces: 11; Weight: 4lbs; Color: Green; Dimensions: 15 x 15 x 5 inches; Materials: plastic, metal, glass

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRO11PCGKC
  • Color: Green

The items in this kit that will increase your chances of recovering valuable material are the 1/2 and 1/4 inch 304 stainless steel wire mesh classifier screens. Helping to sort unwanted material out of your working deposit, stackable, made from high impact ABS plastic and designed to sit on top of a five gallon bucket, these screens are a must have to include in your arsenal of gold panning and gold prospecting equipment.

In addition, the other item worth mentioning is the small but mighty 5lbs magnetic pick up pen tool. As we know, gold will often accumulate where black sand deposits are most concentrated, making this an excellent tool to have on hand when gold panning, not to mention it's lightweight design, which makes it easy to pack and great for travel.

This is a great prospecting kit for beginner, intermediate and expert prospectors alike!
